---
subcategory : "Instances"
---

# ovh_cloud_instance

Use this data source to retrieve information about an instance in a public cloud project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ovh_cloud_instance" "instance" {
  service_name = <Public cloud project id>
  id           = "<instance id>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Instance ID
- `service_name` (String) Service name / cloud project id

### Read-Only

- `availability_zone` (String) Availability zone
- `checksum` (String) Target-spec checksum
- `created_at` (String) Creation date
- `current_state` (Attributes) Observed state (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state))
- `flavor_id` (String) Flavor ID
- `group_id` (String) Placement group ID
- `image_id` (String) Image ID
- `name` (String) Instance name
- `networks` (Attributes List) Requested network interfaces (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--networks))
- `power_state` (String) Desired power state
- `region` (String) Region
- `resource_status` (String) Readiness status
- `security_group_ids` (List of String) Security group IDs
- `shares` (Attributes List) Attached shares (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--shares))
- `ssh_key_name` (String) SSH key name
- `updated_at` (String) Last update date
- `volume_ids` (List of String) Attached volume IDs

<a id="nestedatt--current_state"></a>
### Nested Schema for `current_state`

Read-Only:

- `flavor` (Attributes) Observed flavor details (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state--flavor))
- `group` (Attributes) Placement group membership (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state--group))
- `host_id` (String) Opaque physical host ID
- `image` (Attributes) Observed image details (null for boot-from-volume) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state--image))
- `location` (Attributes) Observed location (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state--location))
- `locked` (Boolean) Whether the instance is locked
- `name` (String) Observed instance name
- `networks` (Attributes List) Observed network interfaces (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state--networks))
- `power_state` (String) Observed power state
- `project_id` (String) Owning project ID
- `security_groups` (Attributes List) Observed security groups (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state--security_groups))
- `shares` (Attributes List) Observed attached shares (only populated on single-instance read) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state--shares))
- `ssh_key_name` (String) SSH key injected at boot
- `user_id` (String) Owning OpenStack user ID
- `volumes` (Attributes List) Observed attached volumes (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state--volumes))

<a id="nestedatt--current_state--flavor"></a>
### Nested Schema for `current_state.flavor`

Read-Only:

- `disk` (Number)
- `ephemeral` (Number)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `ram` (Number)
- `swap` (Number)
- `vcpus` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--current_state--group"></a>
### Nested Schema for `current_state.group`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--current_state--image"></a>
### Nested Schema for `current_state.image`

Read-Only:

- `deprecated` (Boolean)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `size` (Number)
- `status` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--current_state--location"></a>
### Nested Schema for `current_state.location`

Read-Only:

- `availability_zone` (String)
- `region` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--current_state--networks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `current_state.networks`

Read-Only:

- `addresses` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--current_state--networks--addresses))
- `floating_ip_id` (String)
- `gateway_id` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `public` (Boolean)
- `subnet_id` (String)

Read-Only:

- `type` (String)

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)

Read-Only:
